title: Nova Technica
description: Nova Technica is an all-new Oritech-focused tech modpack, perfect for Singleplayer and Multiplayer alike!
body:
![Nova Technica logo in Minecraft font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c60f63d6162e0aeb672921dab0108016fc6f65d.png)

# Nova Technica

Nova Technica is an all-new, *Oritech*-focused tech modpack!

If you want an exciting, questline-focused tech modpack on **Fabric**, then *Nova Technica* is the pack for you!

![Various Oritech machinery strewn about a beach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b8e3894f9be2b14c2587f6f8858ffb99da4a18.png)

The pack features a questline using **FTB Quests** (must be installed manually, alongside FTB Teams and FTB Library).

## Core Experience

This pack is about:
- Automation
  - Design huge, optimized factories to produce the items you need - and fast.
- Computers?
  - With ComputerCraft, you can create anything your heart desires with code: Make automated quarries, interfaces for your storage systems - you name it!
- Progression
  - Follow the questline to progress to learn the basics, then use your imagination to come up with your own machines!

Notable mods in this pack include:
- Oritech
- Refined Storage
- Storage Drawers
- CC: Tweaked
- and more!

*Nova Technica* is great for players who are new to **Oritech**, as the questline will explain the progression of the pack.

I really hope you enjoy my pack!
> StikyPiston2483 (:
